## Checklist

- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes
- [ ] New/changed exported symbols have godoc
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the new behavior
- [ ] Zero new external dependencies (or justification below)
- [ ] README / examples updated when public API changes
